tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Band : Matchbox 20
Song : Bent

 
Chords:
[ch]Em7[/ch]:    X22033
[ch]A7[/ch]:     042000 (I'm calling this A7 for simplicity, though it's not actually)
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]:  03200X
[ch]Am[/ch]:     X03320
[ch]D[/ch]:      X00232
[ch]D/F#[/ch]:   200033


Capo on Second Fret


Intro:

[ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] x2


Verse:
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]               
If I fall along the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
pick me up and dust me off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And if I get too tired to make it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
be my breath so I can walk[/tab]

[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
If I need some other love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Em7[/ch] 
give me more than I can stand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And when my smile gets old and faded[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch] 
wait around I'll smile again[/tab]

[tab]([ch]G[/ch])       [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]               
Shouldn't be so complicated[/tab]
[tab]([ch]Em7[/ch])            [ch]Am[/ch]
Just hold me and then[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
just hold me again[/tab]

[tab]([ch]G[/ch])     [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Can you help me I'm bent?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I'm so scared that I'll never[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
get put back together[/tab]

and this is how we will end[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    
with you and me bent[/tab]


Verse:
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]                
If I couldn't sleep could you sleep?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
could you paint me better off?[/tab]

Could you sympathize with my needs?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I know you think I need a lot[/tab]

I started out clean but I'm jaded[/tab]
[tab]([ch]Em7[/ch])           [ch]Am[/ch]
just phoning it in[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
just breaking the skin[/tab]
